issues.description: Wrong trigger type: uses 'OnKO' but effect text says 'If this Character would be K.O.'d' which is a replacement effect, not a trigger after KO. Should use a special replacement/prevention mechanism or mark as optional with cost.
Missing the replacement mechanic: effect should prevent the KO by paying a cost (trashing a card), not trigger after KO has already happened.
Missing 'once per turn' restriction in the effect structure.
Missing condition that this only applies when K.O.'d 'by an effect' (not by battle).
Missing the 'you may' optional aspect - this is a choice, not mandatory.
TrashFromHand should have count: 1 specified, and it should be a cost to prevent KO, not just an action.
